admin/editor.buy-together.title: Buy Together
admin/editor.buy-together.discountPercen: Discount percentage to be applied to the final price (0-100). Never leave empty! Enter 0 (zero) to apply no discount.
admin/editor.buy-together.customText.des: Text to be displayed next to the price (e.g. PIX, cash, etc.)
admin/editor.buy-together.showCustomText: Whether to show the custom text next to the price
store/buy-together.installments.default: Up to {installmentsNumber}x {installmentValue}{hasInterest, select, true {, {interestRate} of interest} false { interest-free}}
